title: Codex state-sync matcher superset incl. update_plan, fixed at generator source
action: Per D4 (advisor-repaired): extend the state-sync PostToolUse matcher to the superset update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite — never a swap — in BOTH generator layers: (1) hooks/catalog.mjs (renders hooks/hooks.json Codex projection, hooks/claude-hooks.json Claude projection, and bee's own .codex/hooks.json repo target; re-render all three; catalog drift-check --catalog-only stays green; same superset in both projections needs NO new ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES entry — advisor finding 3); (2) onboard_bee.mjs renderCodexHookEntries() (~:1810) AND renderRepoHookEntries() (~:1712) — the separate HOST-repo renderers — so distributed installs get the superset and the managed-file version hash (~:2299) matches. Do NOT add any tool-name filter or tool_input parser to bee-state-sync.mjs — it needs neither (advisor finding 2); DO update its stale header comment listing matched tools, and sync the mirror .bee/bin/hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs so the mirror check stays green. Tests: (a) hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs gains a BEHAVIOR row invoking state-sync with {hook_event_name:PostToolUse, tool_name:update_plan, tool_input:{plan:[{step:x,status:in_progress}]}} asserting exit 0, refreshed counts, unrelated state preserved; plus the matcher-text assertion for the catalog side; (b) test_onboard_bee.mjs host-projection coverage (~754-795) gains EXACT matcher assertions for BOTH host renderers (a generic grep for update_plan anywhere in the script is too weak — advisor finding 3). Scope guard: only state-sync matcher entries, the state-sync header comment + mirror, and their pinning tests change; every other hook entry stays byte-identical.

truths: .codex/hooks.json state-sync matcher contains update_plan and all three legacy names
the matcher value in .codex/hooks.json is produced by the generator, not hand-edited drift
onboard_bee.mjs renderCodexHookEntries() AND renderRepoHookEntries() emit the same superset; version hash at ~:2299 matches the regenerated .codex/hooks.json — no onboarding self-drift
behavior contract row proves state-sync handles a real update_plan payload (exit 0, counts refreshed, unrelated state preserved)

artifacts.substantive: exact matcher assertions for both host renderers

key_links: catalog/generator sources and all rendered manifests agree
onboarding drift check green after regeneration
prohibitions: No other matcher or hook entry modified
No hand-edit of a rendered file that has a generator source
No tool-name filter or payload parser added to bee-state-sync.mjs

verify: bash -c 'node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -q "update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite" .codex/hooks.json && grep -q "update_plan" skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && echo MATCHER-OK'

trace.outcome: Extended the state-sync PostToolUse matcher to the D4 superset update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite in both generator layers (hooks/catalog.mjs canonical catalog; onboard_bee.mjs's renderRepoHookEntries/renderCodexHookEntries host renderers). Regenerated hooks/hooks.json + hooks/claude-hooks.json byte-for-byte from the catalog (matcher line only changed); hand-patched the same single matcher line in .codex/hooks.json (its pre-existing unrelated AskUserQuestion/SubagentStart drift from the full catalog render is out of this cell's scope and left untouched, per the prohibition). Synced the stale header comment in hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs and its .bee/bin/hooks mirror (bee-state-sync.mjs itself needed no code change — it filters on neither tool_name nor tool_input, confirmed and left alone per advisor finding 2). Added a catalog-side matcher-text assertion + an update_plan behavior row (plants a real cell fixture, proves counts refresh + unrelated state.json fields preserved) to hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs, and exact structural PostToolUse-matcher assertions for both host renderers to test_onboard_bee.mjs. Regenerated docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json for the 7 manifest-tracked files that changed.
trace.friction: Discovered mid-verify: guards.mjs:267 falls back to process.env.BEE_AGENT_NAME when a write-guard payload carries no agentName, which leaks the invoking shell's BEE_AGENT_NAME into hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs's isolated write-guard-hold fixtures (3 rows: own-session-hold-never-blocks, legacy-session-less-row-never-blocks, no-session-id-is-zero-difference-even-with-a-hold flip red whenever the test is run with BEE_AGENT_NAME set, reproduced on unmodified HEAD too — unrelated to this cell, out of scope to fix here).
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs", "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: runCatalogDriftChecks() gains row 'state-sync-matcher-is-superset' asserting both catalog projections' PostToolUse matcher for bee-state-sync.mjs equals the exact string 'update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite'",
    "hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: new stateSyncUpdatePlanRow() wired into eventRows() for wrapperBase 'bee-state-sync.mjs' - plants a real cell file on disk, invokes the wrapper with a PostToolUse/update_plan/tool_input.plan payload, asserts exit 0, cells.open/claimed/capped/blocked refreshed to match the planted fixture, last_activity is a valid ISO timestamp, and phase/mode/feature/approved_gates are byte-unchanged",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs section 9a: structural (not string-contained) check that exactly one PostToolUse entry in the applied .claude/settings.json wires bee-state-sync.mjs with matcher exactly 'update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite'",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs section 9c: same structural check against the generated .codex/hooks.json (codexRepo.hooks.PostToolUse)"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this change (git show HEAD~0-before i.e. the pre-edit hooks/catalog.mjs), the PostToolUse group for bee-state-sync.mjs carried matcher: \"TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite\" with no update_plan - confirmed via `git show HEAD:hooks/catalog.mjs` showing that exact literal at the state-sync group. Under that prior matcher a Codex update_plan tool call would never match the PostToolUse hook and bee-state-sync.mjs would never fire for it, so cell counts/last_activity would go stale across update_plan-driven work. The new stateSyncUpdatePlanRow() and state-sync-matcher-is-superset row, run against that pre-change catalog.mjs (git stash of this diff), reproduce the gap: the matcher-text assertion fails (actual=\"TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite\" vs expected superset) though the behavior row itself still passes today's code path since bee-state-sync.mjs never filtered on tool_name internally - the matcher gap is real at the hooks.json/catalog.mjs layer, not inside the wrapper.",
  "verification_run": "Cell's exact verify command (no BEE_AGENT_NAME prefix, since it is read-only): `bash -c 'node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -q \"update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite\" .codex/hooks.json && grep -q \"update_plan\" skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && echo MATCHER-OK'` -> hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: 164 rows / 19 groups, 0 failing, ALL PASS (including the two new rows above); skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1; both grep checks matched; MATCHER-OK printed. Also ran the full repo verify command from .bee/config.json (22 scripts) -> exit 0, last suite SUMMARY: 39/39 passed. node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs -> 4/4 PASS (bee-state-sync.mjs mirror confirmed byte-identical). node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check -> 146 file(s) match stored manifest (after --write regenerated it for the 7 changed manifest-tracked files).",
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "did NOT full-regenerate .codex/hooks.json from renderProjection(CODEX,{target:REPO}) - that render already differs from the on-disk file on two UNRELATED axes (missing AskUserQuestion in the PreToolUse matcher, missing SubagentStart/SubagentStop audit entries) per the D9 comment in hooks/catalog.mjs marking root .codex/hooks.json as a development/fallback snapshot, not the plugin release proof surface; a full re-render would have silently pulled those unrelated changes into this cell, violating the explicit scope guard 'every other hook entry stays byte-identical'. Hand-patched only the one PostToolUse matcher line instead, using the exact generator-sourced string.",
    "did NOT sync .claude/skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs or .agents/skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs mirrors - not in the cell's files list, and computeSkillSync's version preflight self-skips those targets entirely for a self-onboard repo (test_split_brain_regression.mjs comment), so this repo's own onboarding drift is unaffected by leaving them stale until a later distribution-slice cell."
  ]
}
trace.verify_output: hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: 164 rows across 19 check group(s) (0 skipped), 0 failing target contract -> ALL PASS. skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1. grep checks on .codex/hooks.json and onboard_bee.mjs both matched -> MATCHER-OK printed. New rows added and observed passing: catalog-drift::state-sync-matcher-is-superset, bee-state-sync.mjs::update-plan-refreshes-counts-preserves-unrelated-state, plus exact PostToolUse matcher assertions in test_onboard_bee.mjs (settings.json and .codex/hooks.json renderers). Also ran full repo verify (.bee/config.json commands.verify, 22 scripts) -> exit 0, SUMMARY 39/39 passed on the last suite. release_manifest --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest (regenerated via --write after this diff). Note: 3 write-guard-hold rows are flaky ONLY when BEE_AGENT_NAME env var is set during the test run (pre-existing guards.mjs:267 process.env.BEE_AGENT_NAME fallback leaking into isolated fixtures unrelated to this cell's diff, confirmed reproducible on unmodified HEAD too) -- verify run above was executed without that env var, as the command is read-only.
trace.verify_command: bash -c 'node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -q "update_plan|TaskCreate|TaskUpdate|TodoWrite" .codex/hooks.json && grep -q "update_plan" skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && echo MATCHER-OK'
